arts.ttl: West Ham pushing hard for 29 G/A ace who Man United want
arts.sum: After what can best be described as a below average campaign in 2024/25, West Ham appear to be going all out this summer to land Lille’s brilliant striker, Jonathan David. The Canadian already has 29 goals and assists combined this season (transfermarkt), out of a career total of 183 G/A in 301 games.
